bead.title: Stage 1.4: rewrite ADR-002-web-stack.md (full rewrite)
bead.description: Full rewrite of docs/helix/02-design/adr/ADR-002-web-stack.md. Current ADR is 283 lines of React/Vite/Bun/TanStack specifics — those all get replaced. New ADR names: gqlgen, SvelteKit, Svelte 5, Bun (as SvelteKit runtime), Houdini, bits-ui, Tailwind, Playwright, Vitest. Status: 'Accepted 2026-04-14, supersedes prior React decision'. See docs/plan-svelte-migration.md Stage 1 bead #4.
bead.acceptance: (1) `grep -iE 'react|vite|tanstack|msw|minisearch' docs/helix/02-design/adr/ADR-002-web-stack.md` returns ZERO matches. (2) ADR names all Svelte+GraphQL stack components explicitly. (3) Status field updated to Accepted 2026-04-14. (4) Reviewer reads start-to-finish and confirms it describes the new stack, not the old.
